data.title: The VIX And Market Climb: Should We Care?
data.description:
By Michael Lebowitz

The financial media frequently opines on what the daily gyrations of the VIX (implied volatility index) signal regarding investor sentiment. Despite how often it is quoted and discussed, many investors do not truly appreciate what implied volatility measures.

data.title: Why LanzaTech Shares Are Surging On Wednesday
data.description: LanzaTech receives $3M award from US Dept. of Energy for carbon management project. Aligns with goal of converting CO2 into valuable products.

data.title: ExxonMobil Eyes $500M Sale of Bakken Shale Assets in North Dakota
data.description: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE: XOM), the largest oil producer in the United States, is reportedly looking to sell some of its assets in North Dakota's Bakken shale formation. According to a Reuters report, the company aims for a deal that could fetch at least $500 million.

data.title: What's Going On With Bitcoin Mining Stock MARA Holdings Wednesday?
data.description: MARA Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:MARA) shares are moving higher Wednesday after Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) prices climbed to the highest levels since July.

data.title: Goldman Sachs' Q3 Report Impresses Analysts With Strong Investment Banking, Trading Revenues
data.description: Goldman Sachs reported better-than-expected Q3 earnings, driven by strong investment banking and trading revenues. Analysts raise price targets and remain optimistic about future growth.
